name: Consumer Debt Counselors, Inc
description_short: ISO-9001 accredited nonprofit credit counseling agency offering free consultations, debt management, and HUD-approved housing counseling to help consumers achieve financial stability.
description_long:
Consumer Debt Counselors, Inc. is a nonprofit consumer credit counseling agency that has operated for over 25 years, helping Americans address debt and financial challenges. The organization is ISO-9001:2015 accredited, maintains an A+ Better Business Bureau rating, and employs HUD-approved housing counselors and bankruptcy-certified advisors.

The company offers comprehensive financial wellness services including debt relief counseling, student loan analysis, housing and mortgage guidance, bankruptcy information and referrals, and specialized planning for chronic illness financial management and Medicare selection. All initial consultations are free and confidential, with certified counselors available to develop personalized financial plans. They leverage their nonprofit status to negotiate hardship programs with major lenders and explore offers in compromise for charged-off accounts.

Consumer Debt Counselors distinguishes itself through multi-decade experience, professional accreditations, and a holistic approach that separates immediate financial needs from long-term aspirations. They provide education on all available options rather than pushing a single solution, and offer specialized services beyond basic debt counseling, including down payment assistance guidance and mortgage restructuring advice. Client reviews consistently praise specific counselors by name and highlight practical, results-oriented guidance.

The primary limitation is that as a counseling-focused nonprofit, they do not directly provide loans, debt settlement, or credit repair services—they guide clients toward these options through referrals and education. Their strength lies in unbiased financial education and access to hardship programs, making them most valuable for consumers seeking guidance before committing to any major financial decision.
pros: Free and confidential initial consultations with no commitment required
ISO-9001:2015 accredited nonprofit agency with A+ Better Business Bureau rating
HUD-approved housing counselors for pre- and post-purchase guidance
Bankruptcy Code-approved to issue certificates for bankruptcy filers
Leverages nonprofit status to access hardship programs and negotiate with major lenders
Personalized financial plans addressing debt relief, budgeting, student loans, and homeownership
Over 25 years of experience with consistently positive client reviews naming specific counselors
cons: Does not directly provide debt settlement, consolidation loans, or credit repair services—operates primarily as an advisor and referral service
Relies on client self-reporting and cooperation; outcomes depend heavily on client follow-through
Limited geographic service details not specified on website; unclear which states or regions are fully served
best_for: Consumers overwhelmed by debt who need free guidance before committing to debt settlement or consolidation
First-time homebuyers seeking HUD-approved counseling on credit preparation and down payment assistance
Individuals considering bankruptcy who need unbiased information and referrals to qualified attorneys
diagnosis: Consumer Debt Counselors is best for consumers seeking unbiased, free financial guidance and education before committing to debt management solutions. The critical caveat is that they function as advisors and referral services rather than direct service providers—they educate and guide but do not settle debts, issue loans, or repair credit reports themselves.
services: Free financial wellness consultations with certified credit counselors
Debt relief counseling and hardship program negotiation with lenders
Student loan debt analysis and repayment strategy guidance
HUD-approved housing counseling for home purchase preparation and mortgage issues
Mortgage modification and restructuring option review
Bankruptcy education and attorney referrals with certificate issuance
Budget development and financial goal alignment planning
Medicare plan selection and comparison guidance
Offer in compromise negotiation for charged-off accounts
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
